name: Rubyx Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹40,000

domestic: Two complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Offers 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Two complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter (no spend requirement)
Offers 2 complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter (no spends criteria).

joiningBenefitsValued.label: EaseMyTrip vouchers worth ₹2,000 (two vouchers of ₹1,000 each)
Croma vouchers worth ₹1,000 (two vouchers of ₹500 each)

joiningBenefits: EaseMyTrip vouchers worth ₹2,000 (two vouchers of ₹1,000 each)
Croma vouchers worth ₹1,000 (two vouchers of ₹500 each)

milestones.label: Earn 3,000 reward points on spending ₹3,00,000 in an anniversary year
1,500 additional Reward Points for every ₹1 lakh spent beyond ₹3 lakh in an anniversary year, capped at 15,000 points total

milestoneBenefits: Earn 3,000 reward points on spending ₹3,00,000 in an anniversary year
Earn 1,500 reward points for every subsequent ₹1,00,000 spent in the same anniversary year, capped at 15,000 reward points per year
additionalBenefits: Two complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Two complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter (no spend requirement)
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at ₹150 per ticket, twice a month (minimum 2 tickets), subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible monthly spends
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding ₹50,000 per month
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Card image (icici-rubyx.webp) downloaded from official ICICI Bank page on 2026-06-06.
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Rubyx credit card specifications.
Joining fee of ₹3,000 and Annual fee of ₹2,000. Annual fee is waived on spending ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.
Domestic retail spends earn 2 reward points per ₹100 spent (0.5% return value).
International spends earn 4 reward points per ₹100 spent (1.0% return value).
Utility and insurance spends earn 1 reward point per ₹100 spent (0.25% return value) and are capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000.
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹40,000.
Offers 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per quarter, subject to spending ₹75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Offers 2 complimentary domestic railway lounge visits per quarter (no spends criteria).
Offers 25% discount on movie tickets, capped at ₹150 per ticket, twice a month (minimum 2 tickets), subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Complimentary golf rounds (up to 4 per month) require spending ₹50,000 per round in the previous calendar month.
Eligibility: Age must be 21-65 years; minimum net monthly salary of ₹50,000 for salaried, and annual income/ITR of ₹5,50,000 for self-employed.
